project_type: Python CLI tool being converted to Flask web application
test_framework: None currently - will add basic verification via Flask test client
test_command: python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app(); print('App created successfully')"
verification_instructions:
1. Install requirements: pip install -r requirements.txt
2. Run the Flask app: python app.py
3. Verify web UI loads at http://localhost:5000
4. Confirm Settings page allows adding/editing accounts
5. Confirm Dashboard allows creating projects
6. Confirm History section shows past project runs
key_patterns:
- TikTok class in main.py takes sessionid, has get_video() and send(comment, aweme_id) methods
- MedoSigner/ handles TikTok API signature generation (Gorgon, Argus, Ladon)
- comments.json stores pre-loaded comment templates in EN/AR
- The TikTok class uses requests library for HTTP calls
directory_structure: Root: main.py (CLI bot), comments.json (comment templates), requirements.txt (deps), MedoSigner/ (TikTok signature module with argus.py, gorgon.py, ladon.py)
